changelog:
Per-endpoint 429 failover + correctness and efficiency cleanup.

Per-endpoint 429 failover (Kiro IDE / CodeWhisperer / AmazonQ):
- CallKiroAPI now tries every configured endpoint before declaring quota exhaustion. AWS rate-limits per (identity, action), so a 429 on Kiro IDE does NOT imply CodeWhisperer or AmazonQ are throttled. Previously the proxy would skip the account on the first 429 and waste healthy capacity on the other two surfaces.
- Surfaces a single QuotaError carrying the SHORTEST upstream Retry-After across the chain so pool cooldown reflects the most optimistic recovery hint.
- Per-endpoint throttle is logged at INFO; only the chain-exhaustion case logs WARN.
- New tests: TestCallKiroAPIFailsOverAcrossEndpointsOn429, TestCallKiroAPIRecoversWhenSecondEndpointSucceeds.

Correctness:
- config.GetProxyURL / GetPreferredEndpoint / GetEndpointFallback now nil-guard cfg so they don't panic during early-startup or test contexts.
- QuotaError.Endpoint string -> Endpoints []string. Error() joins with '+'. Exposes the full chain for logs and future per-endpoint metrics.
- Translator silently drops Anthropic server-tool blocks (server_tool_use, web_search_tool_result, code_execution_*, mcp_*) instead of forwarding them and getting upstream-rejected. New logUnsupportedBlock helper centralizes the breadcrumb.

Efficiency:
- json.Marshal(payload) hoisted out of the per-endpoint loop. Re-marshals only when an endpoint's Origin actually differs (today all three share AI_EDITOR, so it marshals once per request).
- Debug payload dump gated on logger.GetLevel() <= LevelDebug to skip the string conversion in production.
- 429 response body drained with io.LimitReader(resp.Body, 64<<10) before Close so the connection returns to keep-alive without unbounded read latency.
- Non-200 / non-429 error envelope read also capped at 64KiB. Same cap applied to all four io.ReadAll sites in proxy/kiro_api.go (UsageLimits / SubscriptionInfo / DeveloperProfiles / VendedCredentials).
- accountHasModel takes a pre-normalized modelKey; strings.ToLower+TrimSpace hoisted once before the SWRR walk in GetNextForModel.

Quality:
- New (h *Handler) handleUpstreamError(err, accountID, model, apiKeyID) helper collapses 7 copies of the recordFailure+recordPoolError+checkOverageError triple across handler.go / responses_handler.go / responses_ws.go.
- Deleted dead AccountPool.GetNext wrapper, dead capInferenceMaxTokens wrapper, dead accountSlot.id and AccountPool.totalWeight fields.
- New pool.NewForTesting() lets unit tests construct an empty pool without bringing up the config singleton.
- New TestHandleUpstreamError* tests cover the nil / *QuotaError / generic-error branches.

Docker:
- Removed obsolete `version: '3.8'` from docker-compose.yml so Compose stops emitting the deprecation warning on every up/down.
